command: Use the review-loop:execute skill with --review-only --description "REVIEW_TARGET_SMOKE_TOKEN: review-only smoke pass over review-loop repo top-level docs". Copy the --description verbatim into the ## Review Target section. Run a single Reviewer round on the existing working tree and stop as soon as the Reviewer returns VERDICT. The Approved Plan body must be the canonical two-line review-only sentinel; the scope lives in ## Review Target. Log round 1 in ## Review History with '- Executor backend: skipped (review-only first round)' per skills/execute/SKILL.md.
